notes: Pure scaffolding file: defines the projective closure of the affine divisor group (`ProjectiveDivisor C = Finsupp` on `ProjectiveSmoothPoint C`), the `projectiveDivisorOf` map (affine + infinity coefficient), `ProjIsPrincipal`, `PicProj`/`PicProj₀`, and degree arithmetic — all sorry-free, axiom-clean. Roughly half the declarations are dead-code within the file (14+ unused in file, used by downstream files). The two product-formula lemmas (`Polynomial.sum_rootMultiplicity_eq_natDegree`, `RatFunc.intDegree_eq_sum_sub_of_isAlgClosed`) are likely near-mathlib content; the second is unused in file and may be a mathlib duplication.
